title: Proclamation No. 142, s. 1963
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 142

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 63, SERIES OF 1925, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE GOVERNMENT CENTER RESERVATION, A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND EMBRACED THEREIN SITUATED IN RESIDENCE SECTION “A”, BAGUIO CITY, AND RESERVING THE SAME FOR OFFICE AND SESSION HALL SITE PURPOSES OF THE SUPREME COURT OF THE PHILIPPINES

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 63, series of 1925, which established the Government Center Reservation, a certain parcel of land embraced therein, situated in Residence Section “A,” Baguio City, and reserve the same for office and session hall site purposes of the Supreme Court of the Philippines, which parcel of land is more particularly described as follows:

Nr-159 Republic of the Philippines (Supreme Court of the Philippines)

A parcel of land (as shown on plan Nr-159, L.R.C. Record No. ‑‑‑‑‑), situated in the City of Baguio. Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2, bf Proposed Road; on the NW, along line 2-3, by Road; on the NE., along line 3-4, by Existing Road; and on the SE., along lines 4-5-6-1 by Weather Bureau Site. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being S. 46° 51′ E., 295.88 meters from the Triangulation Station, Happy Baguio Town Site, thence N. 40° 11′ W., 45.00 meters to point 2; thence N. 46° 09′ E., 145.00 meters to point 3; thence S. 16° 51′ E., 77.59 meters to point 4; thence S. 54° 23′ W., 43.95 meters to point 5; thence S. 58° 39′ W., 38.28 meters to point 6; thence S. 62° 56′ W., 3o.40 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 7,808 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as follows: point 5 and 6, by Old P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mons.; and the rest by B.L. Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of survey, Oct. 30-81, 1962, and was approved on Feb. 7, 1963.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 29th day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-three.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President:

RUFINO G. HECHANOVA Executive Secretary

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
